events.label: Volunteer Orientation & Training
events.location: Gowanus Dredgers Canoe Club Boathouse, 165 2nd St, Brooklyn, NY, 11231, United States
events.desc: May marks the start of the on-water season, and we’re kicking things off with a new volunteer orientation and training.  Join us for a 90-minute session that will teach you everything you need to know about volunteering with the Dredgers.

events.label: Guided Sunset Paddle
events.location: Gowanus Dredgers Bunker (19th St.), 2 19th St., Brooklyn, NY
events.desc: Join the Gowanus Dredgers Canoe Club for a secret, one of a kind, personal sunset cruise in canoes above Brooklyn’s Gowanus Canal.  Meet at the the Gowanus Dredgers Bunker, at the end of 19th St / off 3rd Ave, 11232 – NOT our 2nd St.

events.label: Monthly Meeting + Paddle
events.desc: Socialize with the Dredgers at our BUNKER (2 19th St, off of 3rd Ave) for a casual member catch-up and paddle!  We’ll gather at 6:30 for some chatting and aim to be on-water around 7:15.

events.label: FREE Walk-Up Paddling - 2nd St.
events.location: Gowanus Dredgers Canoe Club Boathouse, 165 2nd St, Brooklyn, NY, 11231, United States
events.desc: Hop into a Gowanus Dredgers canoe and paddle at your own pace inside the protected Gowanus Canal.  Enjoy discovering the canal’s unique mix of wildlife and urban waterway infrastructure, practice your paddling skills, or take a guided audio tour and learn more about the history, cleanup and revitalization of our favorite urban waterway.

events.label: Unheard-of + Dredgers present videogame Funk band Discocactus
events.desc: Cultural Ecologies Series: Unheard-of and Discocactus Date: May 23rd, 2026, 7PM Canoe Launch, 7:30PM Music Location: Gowanus Dredgers Bunker, 2 19th St, Brooklyn, NY 11232 Canoe Seats: $15 donation to Dredgers, Shore seating Free RSVP/Tickets here Join Unheard-of Ensemble, the Dredgers, and special guests video game jazz-funk ensemble Discocactus to open the season!  Unheard-of opens the show with new premieres written for them by Annika Socolofsky and Discocactus’s own keyboardist Ben Wallace.

events.label: Canoe Camp (for Grownups!)
events.location: Gowanus Dredgers Bunker (19th St.), 2 19th St., Brooklyn, NY
events.desc: Are you excited to get on the water this summer?  Come to Canoe Camp for two weekends of on-water adventure, skill-building, and summer camp vibes!

events.label: Pop-Up Choir: Yacht Rock by the Water
events.location: Gowanus Dredgers Canoe Club Boathouse, 165 2nd St, Brooklyn, NY, 11231, United States
events.desc: Join the Yacht Rock Choir at the Gowanus Dredgers Boathouse for a pop-up choir by the water.  In this two-hour, open-to-all singing experience, we’ll learn a yacht rock or nautical-inspired song in four-part harmony — entirely by ear — and then perform it together outdoors in the lovely Gowanus Waterfront Park.
